name: Peanut Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. In a microwaveable, large bowl combine sugar and corn syrup.
2. Microwave for 5 minutes on high (100 percent). Stir in peanuts.
3. Microwave an additional 2 to 5 minutes, stirring every 2 minutes or until the peanuts and syrup are light brown. Stir in margarine, vanilla, and baking soda until light and foamy.
4. Spread mixture to a thickness of about 1/4 inch on a large well-buttered cookie sheet. Allow to cool completely.
5. Break into pieces and store in an air-tight container.
